description: arXiv:2603.15886v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present PhasorFlow, an open-source Python library for computing on the $S^1$ unit circle. Inputs are encoded as complex phasors $z=e^{i\phi}$ on the $N$-torus ($\mathbb{T}^N$); as computation proceeds through unitary wave-interference gates, global norm is preserved while components drift into $\mathbb{C}^N$, letting algorithms levera...
author: Dibakar Sigdel, Namuna Panday
